title: dispatch_request_consecutive_addresses_differ uses literal 0 not PAYMENT_ACCOUNT
description: The test calls store.ensure_account(0) (literal) instead of store.ensure_account(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT). PAYMENT_ACCOUNT is accessible in the tests module (same file). If PAYMENT_ACCOUNT were ever changed, the test would silently use the wrong account while production code uses the new value, making the test a poor integration check. Fix: use PAYMENT_ACCOUNT in the test call.
